nasb.text: But he did not give any to the sons of Kohath because theirs was the service of the holy objects, which they carried on the shoulder.

esv.text: But to the sons of Kohath he gave none, because they were charged with the service of the holy things that had to be carried on the shoulder.

cnv.text: 但是沒有分給哥轄的子孫，因為他們所辦的事是聖所的事，是要用肩頭抬的。

ccb.text: 摩西没有把供物分给哥辖的子孙，因为他们要用肩扛所负责的圣物。
